title: Rainbow Oaks Renewed
description: The Rainbow Oak trees from the Twilight Forest mod. Just the trees...but in the overworld. That's it. That's the mod.
body:
![Rainbow trees](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/225d2289ddfe87500234c29dc7e097eef45e416f.png)
 

The Rainbow Oak trees from the Twilight Forest mod. Just the trees...but in the overworld. That's it. That's the mod. 

(By default, they are found only in _**vanilla Flower Forests**_. This can be changed with a datapack if you know how. I would like to eventually get around to offering one here for people to use and/or edit, but I may never get the time to.)

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e7b79e0e7bbfb385864e4673a64228d9a5f852e.png)
![Beeg Tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a225bb9ac4e1d0d2785a866d6012bbeaf7c9e5de.png)

You can also find this on [Curseforge](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rainbow-oaks-3/)...not that you'd want to. :P 

 </br></br>
Past versions of this mod:</br>
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rainbow-oak-trees (was for 1.10-1.12, no longer on CF)</br>
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rainbow-oak-trees-2 (MC 1.17-1.19.3)</br>
</br>
Special thanks to [Benimatic](https://www.curseforge.com/members/benimatic) for the original [Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest) mod, as well as the current team maintaining it!</br>
